note: Criterion IDs and one-line authored summaries. Full text in AICPA TSP Section 100 PDF.

controls.title: Board demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values
controls.description: The board and management visibly champion integrity and ethical conduct, setting the tone for behavior across the organization

controls.title: Board independent of management; exercises oversight of internal controls
controls.description: An independent board provides effective oversight of management's design and operation of internal controls

controls.title: Management establishes reporting structures and authorities
controls.description: Management defines clear reporting lines, authorities, and responsibilities to support the achievement of control objectives

controls.title: Competence policies established for roles that affect internal controls
controls.description: The organization attracts, develops, and retains competent personnel for roles that impact internal control effectiveness

controls.title: Accountability enforced for internal control responsibilities
controls.description: Individuals are held accountable for fulfilling their assigned internal control duties in pursuit of organizational objectives

controls.title: Uses relevant quality information to support the achievement of objectives
controls.description: Relevant, accurate, and timely information is obtained or generated to support the functioning of internal controls

controls.title: Internal communication of control information and responsibilities
controls.description: Internal communications convey control objectives, responsibilities, and information needed for personnel to perform their roles

controls.title: Communication with external parties on matters affecting controls
controls.description: The organization communicates with customers, vendors, and other external parties on matters affecting internal controls

controls.title: Objectives specified with sufficient clarity to identify related risks
controls.description: The organization defines objectives with enough specificity to allow identification and assessment of related risks

controls.title: Risks to achievement of objectives identified and analyzed
controls.description: Risks to achieving organizational objectives are identified and analyzed as a basis for determining how to manage them

controls.title: Fraud risk assessed including risk of management override
controls.description: The organization assesses the potential for fraud, including the risk of management override of controls

controls.title: Changes that could affect the system of internal controls identified
controls.description: Changes in the business, regulatory, or operating environment that could impact internal controls are identified and assessed

controls.title: Ongoing and separate evaluations to ascertain control effectiveness
controls.description: Ongoing and periodic separate evaluations are performed to determine whether internal controls are present and functioning

controls.title: Control deficiencies evaluated and communicated to responsible parties
controls.description: Control deficiencies are evaluated and communicated in a timely manner to those responsible for taking corrective action

controls.title: Control activities selected and developed to mitigate risks
controls.description: Control activities are selected and developed to help reduce risks to the achievement of objectives to acceptable levels

controls.title: Technology controls selected and developed to achieve objectives
controls.description: General technology controls are designed and implemented to support the achievement of the organization's objectives

controls.title: Controls deployed through policies and procedures
controls.description: Control activities are deployed through formal policies that establish expectations and procedures that put them into action

controls.title: Logical and physical access controls limit access to system assets
controls.description: Logical and physical access controls restrict access to information assets to authorized users only

controls.title: New internal and external users provisioned with appropriate access
controls.description: New internal and external users are registered and authorized prior to being granted access to system resources

controls.title: Access to system assets removed when no longer required
controls.description: Access rights are modified or revoked promptly when users change roles or no longer require access to system assets

controls.title: Physical access to facilities restricted and monitored
controls.description: Physical access to facilities housing information assets is restricted to authorized personnel and continuously monitored

controls.title: Assets protected from unauthorized access and environmental threats
controls.description: Logical and physical safeguards protect information assets from unauthorized use, disclosure, and environmental hazards

controls.title: Boundaries of system protect against unauthorized external access
controls.description: Network and system boundaries are protected against unauthorized access originating from outside the system's perimeter

controls.title: Restricted access to confidential information during transmission
controls.description: Confidential information is protected during transmission, movement, and removal through encryption or equivalent safeguards

controls.title: Unauthorized software prevented from accessing system resources
controls.description: Controls prevent or detect introduction of unauthorized or malicious software into the production environment

controls.title: Vulnerabilities detected through monitoring of configurations
controls.description: Configurations are monitored against baselines to detect vulnerabilities and unauthorized changes in the environment

controls.title: Anomalies and security incidents detected through monitoring
controls.description: System components and user activity are monitored to detect anomalies indicative of malicious acts or security events

controls.title: Identified security incidents evaluated and responded to
controls.description: Detected security events are evaluated to determine whether they represent incidents requiring formal response actions

controls.title: Security incidents contained; impact documented; root cause analyzed
controls.description: Confirmed incidents are contained, remediated, documented, and analyzed to determine root cause and prevent recurrence

controls.title: Incident response communications to affected parties and regulators
controls.description: The organization communicates with affected customers, regulators, and other stakeholders about incidents as required

controls.title: Changes to infrastructure, data, software and procedures managed
controls.description: Changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures are authorized, designed, tested, and approved before deployment

controls.title: Business disruption risks identified and mitigation strategies assessed
controls.description: Risks of business disruption are identified, assessed, and mitigated through controls such as insurance and contingency plans

controls.title: Business partners and vendors assessed and managed for risk
controls.description: Risks associated with vendors and business partners are assessed and managed throughout the relationship lifecycle

controls.title: Current processing capacity and usage monitored and evaluated
controls.description: Capacity and usage are monitored to ensure sufficient processing resources are available to meet availability commitments

controls.title: Environmental, regulatory and technological changes that affect availability evaluated
controls.description: Environmental protections, software, and infrastructure are designed and maintained to support continued system availability

controls.title: Recovery plan to restore availability in case of disruption
controls.description: Recovery plans and procedures are tested regularly to ensure availability can be restored after a disruption

controls.title: Confidential information identified and designated
controls.description: Confidential information is identified and designated so that it can be afforded appropriate protection during its lifecycle

controls.title: Confidential information protected during retention and disposal
controls.description: Confidential information is securely retained and disposed of in a manner that prevents unauthorized disclosure

controls.title: Processing complete, accurate and timely per system requirements
controls.description: Information used in processing is obtained, produced, and maintained completely, accurately, and on a timely basis

controls.title: System inputs validated and errors corrected
controls.description: System inputs are validated for completeness and accuracy, with errors identified and corrected before further processing

controls.title: System processing errors detected and corrected
controls.description: Processing activities are performed in line with specifications, with errors detected and corrected promptly

controls.title: System output complete, accurate and distributed to authorized parties
controls.description: Outputs are complete, accurate, and delivered to the appropriate authorized recipients in accordance with specifications

controls.title: Stored data protected, retained, and disposed in accordance with requirements
controls.description: Stored data inputs and outputs are retained, protected, and disposed of consistently with processing integrity objectives

controls.title: Privacy notice provided to data subjects about collection and use
controls.description: Data subjects are provided with notice describing how their personal information is collected, used, retained, and disclosed

controls.title: Personal information collected only with consent or lawful basis
controls.description: Personal information is collected only after obtaining valid consent or establishing another lawful basis for processing

controls.title: Personal information collected limited to that which is relevant
controls.description: Collection of personal information is limited to what is relevant and necessary for the disclosed purposes

controls.title: Sensitive personal information collected only with explicit consent
controls.description: Sensitive categories of personal information are collected only after obtaining explicit consent from the data subject

controls.title: Personal information used only for purposes for which collected
controls.description: Personal information is used only for the purposes identified in the privacy notice and consented to by the data subject

controls.title: Personal information retained for no longer than necessary
controls.description: Personal information is retained only for as long as needed to fulfill the stated purposes or meet legal obligations

controls.title: Obsolete personal information destroyed or anonymized
controls.description: Personal information that is no longer needed is securely destroyed, deleted, or anonymized to prevent further use

controls.title: Data subjects can access, review and correct their information
controls.description: Data subjects are provided with the ability to access and review their personal information held by the organization

controls.title: Personal information corrected or erased upon verified request
controls.description: Verified requests from data subjects to correct, update, or erase personal information are acted upon in a timely manner

controls.title: Personal information disclosed only to authorized parties
controls.description: Personal information is disclosed only to third parties that are authorized and have committed to equivalent protections

controls.title: Disclosures authorized and limited to stated purposes
controls.description: Disclosures of personal information are authorized and limited to the purposes described in the privacy notice

controls.title: Third parties informed of privacy commitments; compliance monitored
controls.description: Third parties receiving personal information are informed of privacy commitments and monitored for ongoing compliance

controls.title: Individuals notified of breaches affecting their personal information
controls.description: Affected data subjects and regulators are notified of incidents involving unauthorized disclosure of personal information

controls.title: Unsolicited personal information handled per privacy notice
controls.description: Personal information received without solicitation is evaluated and handled in line with the organization's privacy commitments

controls.title: Requests from data subjects to correct or erase information honored
controls.description: Requests from data subjects to amend or remove personal information are processed, verified, and propagated to third parties

controls.title: Personal information transferred to third parties per agreements
controls.description: Personal information transferred to third parties is governed by agreements that enforce equivalent privacy obligations

controls.title: Personal information quality maintained per standards
controls.description: Personal information is maintained to be accurate, complete, and relevant for the purposes for which it is used

controls.title: Inquiries and complaints from data subjects addressed promptly
controls.description: Inquiries, complaints, and disputes raised by data subjects regarding privacy practices are addressed promptly and tracked
